alt: Sirocco the famous kakapo looking curiously with its moss-green patterned feathers
caption: The kakapo is a critically endangered, nocturnal, flightless parrot endemic to New Zealand.
acquisitionNotes: High-resolution hero portrait of Sirocco the kakapo showcasing exquisite feather patterns. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/b/b1/Kakapo_Sirocco_1.jpg
